lane: Seba Hub — Nightly Occupancy (cabins · RV · geodomes · MIDWEEK gap)
target: TWO PARALLEL TRACKS, one engine. (A) ORGANIZERS → midweek blocks (one yes = 10–50 beds; ~25–30% human to arrange). (B) INDIVIDUALS → weekend nights, ~90%+ AI: harvest → nudge → drop a ResNexus self-book link (sebastays.com) → they book themselves; Karen/office = phone fallback. AI can offer a ResNexus discount code to close. 85% needs BOTH — weekends are only 2 of 7 nights. Season ~3 months, day 8 — run both now.
channel_gate: green_public_declared = ok · green_own_account = ok · amber_inferred_public = content only · red_individual_private = NEVER a message to a person, content only, no override. Pilot runs GREEN-ONLY.

signals.raw: Planning our women's fall retreat for ~24. Weekends everywhere are booked and over budget — anyone know a spot within an hour of Edmonton?
signals.sizzle: Unpaid volunteer coordinator, terrified of letting the group down. Wants it handled, not a sales pitch.
signals.move: Rescue-register midweek GROUP BLOCK offer (24 beds) — lead with 'we handle the logistics'

drafts.text: Planning a retreat for 24 is a big lift — happy to take the logistics off your plate. We can hold a midweek block an hour from Edmonton (cabins + a gather space), one price, one invoice. You just show up. Want me to send a midweek hold?

If you want the group truly unplugged, we can set you up off-grid midweek — cabins in the woods, a lake, trails, and a communal cookhouse for the group. We coordinate the whole stay so you don't have to. Want options?

signals.raw: Anyone know a cozy spot for a midweek craft getaway? About 12 of us, want somewhere relaxing in nature.
signals.sizzle: Center-of-influence host; picks midweek for calm + cost. Wants togetherness + zero hassle.
signals.move: Midweek block for 12 + a craft/gather room; rescue the host

drafts.text: A midweek craft getaway for 12 is exactly our sweet spot — cabins plus a warm room to spread out and create, one hour from Edmonton. We'll set the whole thing up so you can just enjoy it. Want a midweek block held?
If the group wants to properly switch off, we can do off-grid cabins in the woods with a cozy communal space for the craft circle. We handle the setup end to end. Want me to send dates?

signals.source: Inbound DM to our own page
signals.raw: Saw your page — do you do midweek group bookings? I run a book club, about 10 of us, looking for a weekend away (open to midweek to save).
signals.sizzle: Already warm (came to us). Open to midweek = aligned with our gap.
signals.move: Convert warm inbound to a midweek block; human closer takes it

drafts.text: We do — and midweek is honestly the nicest time to come, quieter and easier on the budget. For a book club of 10 we can hold cabins plus a comfy space to gather, all on one booking. Want me to put a midweek hold on a couple of dates?
I'll have someone from our team confirm a midweek group rate and a couple of date options for your book club of 10 — they can have it sorted in a quick call.

signals.raw: Captain here — want to organize a midweek trail-running getaway near Edmonton, ~15 of us. Need somewhere with actual trails.
signals.sizzle: Active-group leader; the trails ARE the product. Midweek by choice.
signals.move: Midweek block + our ~5km of curated forest trails as the hook

drafts.text: We've got about 5km of curated forest trails right on site and cabins to match — a midweek block for 15 runners would have the place mostly to yourselves. We'll handle the booking as one package. Want trail maps + dates?
For a 15-person midweek trail weekend an hour from Edmonton: cabins, on-site trails, a lake to cool off in, and a country restaurant for the post-run feed. One booking, we coordinate it. Want a hold?

signals.raw: Got volunteered to plan a 2-day team offsite within an hour of Edmonton, ~20 people, midweek to keep costs down. Help!
signals.sizzle: The 'no good deed' volunteer — wants to not get fired and look good. Pure rescue.
signals.move: Midweek block + meeting/gather space; position as 'we make you look good'

drafts.text: Planning a 20-person offsite is a thankless job — let us make you the hero. Midweek block an hour from Edmonton: cabins, a room set up for sessions, and space to actually connect. One invoice, we run the logistics. Want a midweek hold?
I'll have our team put together a simple midweek offsite package for ~20 (rooms + meeting space + meals) and walk you through it — you'll have something to send your boss today.

signals.raw: Slo-pitch league wind-up — thinking a group weekend for ~25 players. Midweek cheaper? Need beds + somewhere to hang out.
signals.sizzle: Social leader; group bonding is the job. Budget-aware = midweek-open.

drafts.text: A 25-player wind-up is right up our alley — midweek we can give your crew cabins, a gym to mess around in, and Lenny's restaurant on site for the team dinner. One booking, we sort it all. Want me to hold a midweek block?
If the team wants a proper escape, we can set up an off-grid midweek block with a fire pit and a lake — perfect for a wind-up. We handle the whole thing. Want dates?

signals.raw: Anyone know cabins near Kokanee this weekend? Everything's booked.
signals.sizzle: WEEKEND track. Ready to book — mostly self-serve: hand them a booking link and they close themselves.
signals.move: Reply with live availability + a BOOKING LINK (self-serve close, ~0 human time)

drafts.text: If you're still stuck, we've got a cabin open this weekend an hour from Edmonton — here's the link to grab it before it's gone: book instantly on sebastays.com.

signals.raw: Last-minute — any RV sites with hookups open this weekend within ~1hr of Edmonton?
signals.move: Reply with weekend RV availability + booking link (self-serve)

drafts.text: We've got full-hookup RV sites open this weekend, about an hour out — here's the link to lock one in: book instantly on sebastays.com.

signals.raw: Do you have a geodome free this Saturday for 2? Anniversary trip.
signals.sizzle: WEEKEND track, warm inbound. Self-serve with a touch of warmth.
signals.move: Confirm Saturday geodome + booking link; small anniversary touch

drafts.text: We do — a geodome's open Saturday and it's a beautiful anniversary spot. Here's the link to book it, and we'll add a little something to mark the occasion: book instantly on sebastays.com.

signals.raw: First warm weekend and I am DONE with the city.
signals.sizzle: Latent getaway intent, but it's a stranger venting. GATE: content only, never a DM.
signals.move: BLOCKED from direct contact by the channel gate → convert to a public post

drafts.text: [Public post, no targeting: 'First warm weekend? Here are 5 easy ways to get an hour out of the city for a night — cabins, RV, or a geodome under the stars.']
[red_individual_private — the gate forbids any message addressed to this person, in any phase. Content only.]
